title: Bootstrap rules should be specific, not filler
why_this_case_exists: A memory file that only says obvious things is not useful. This case checks rule quality, not just whether files were created.
setup: Bootstrap completed successfully and wrote playbook and memory files.
Review focuses on the quality of the generated rules.
expected: Rules mention concrete terms, structures, or style choices.
The file is short but still obviously tied to this project.
should_not_happen: The output is dominated by generic advice.
A reviewer cannot tell what project the memory belongs to.
